name: Renault
philosophy: | Renault's web presence pairs the freshly-modernised Renault diamond (the 2021 flat-line rhombus mark) with a stark black-and-white canvas, a signature Sunlight Yellow accent, and the proprietary NouvelR display typeface.
trademark_signals: Two-tone canvas system — (white) for browsing, (black) for storytelling — switched in full-bleed bands rather than subtle gradations
A single brand accent — Sunlight Yellow — used scarcely on primary CTAs, "NEW" badges, R5 hero photography, and configurator dot indicators
NouvelR everywhere, with headlines at 56px / weight 700 / lineHeight: 0.95 so condensed multi-line headlines stack cleanly
Square geometry: (2px) on buttons, on tiles and product cards, reserved exclusively for sub-nav chips and decorative badges
Photography-first product tiles — vehicle photos full-bleed inside otherwise neutral cards, with copy stacked beneath rather than overlaid
ai_slop_avoided: introduce a secondary accent colour. Yellow is the only brand accent; semantic colours (, ) are functional, not decorative
round vehicle cards or promo tiles. Square-cornered photography is core to the brand expression
soften body weights to 500 or 600 — the system relies on the 400 / 700 contrast
